nodes.label: AI as information synthesis tool for long-term decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or unnecessary for hands-on craft
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to quickly find the information I need about the plant and make a checklist for me so I can use it as a reference and guide as I choose the right spot to place the new plant

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Almost always collaborative. I don't want my work to be completely done by anyone or anything else

nodes.label: AI reliability in structured tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It was fantastic at finding and summarizing information... No matter what I said, the puzzle never looked right

nodes.label: Organizational acceptance of AI use
nodes.grounding_span: Some people at the university don't like when they see work that appears to have been done by AI

nodes.label: AI complementing human expertise in nature
nodes.label_negative: AI replacing human experience of nature
nodes.grounding_span: Having both a horticulturalist and AI to fully explain everything about a plant seems like a very full experience to me, one that compliments the other

nodes.label: Pride in hands-on craftsmanship
nodes.grounding_span: I take pride in the fine detail hands-on work that I do so I want that to be all me

nodes.label: Informed decision-making for long-term impact
nodes.grounding_span: help me make better choices for situations that have a long-term impact

nodes.label: Authentic human-nature connection
nodes.grounding_span: the experience of enjoying nature is complimented by knowing all of the facts and information, but not the primary purpose for most

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for information tasks
nodes.grounding_span: One time I was really satisfied with AI was when I was using it to create an information sheet for a Magnolia

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for visual/spatial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: No matter what I said or how specific or general I made the prompt, the puzzle never looked right

nodes.label: Preference for hands-on tasks without AI
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to make those decisions myself because I take pride in the fine detail hands-on work

nodes.label: Optimism about AI integration in horticulture
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine that it will grow somewhat, with AI becoming more integrated in the information side of my job

nodes.label: Collaborative integration — maintains personal involvement while leveraging AI
nodes.grounding_span: I always try to have a hand in any work that I do

nodes.label: Pragmatic outcome orientation — explores AI if it leads to better results
nodes.grounding_span: whatever results in best outcome should at least be explored so if I think that using AI will result in a better outcome, I will try using AI for that task
